# FetchIconOptions.HttpMessageHandler property

An `HttpMessageHandler` to build a one-shot HttpClient around (an injection point for tests). Ignored when [`HttpClient`](./HttpClient.md) is set; it is not disposed by the SDK so a test handler can be reused across calls.

```csharp
public HttpMessageHandler? HttpMessageHandler { get; set; }
```
